name: mitedtsm-ui-admin-vue3
description: 基于 Vue 3、Vite 8、Element Plus 和 TypeScript 的管理端
author: xingyu

scripts.lint:crm-contract-amendment: eslint --max-warnings=0 --ext .ts,.vue src/api/crm/contract/amendment.ts src/api/crm/contract/lifecycle.ts src/views/crm/contract/components/ContractProductForm.vue src/views/crm/contract/detail/ContractAmendmentDialog.vue src/views/crm/contract/detail/ContractLifecyclePanel.vue src/locales/zh-CN/crm.ts src/locales/en/crm.ts src/locales/ar/crm.ts

scripts.lint:crm-authorization: eslint --max-warnings=0 --ext .ts,.vue src/locales/zh-CN/crm.ts src/locales/en/crm.ts src/locales/ar/crm.ts src/views/crm/clue/index.vue src/views/crm/customer/index.vue src/views/crm/contact/index.vue src/views/crm/business/index.vue src/views/crm/contract/index.vue src/views/crm/receivable/index.vue src/views/crm/receivable/plan/index.vue src/views/crm/refund/index.vue src/views/crm/refund/components/CustomerRefundList.vue src/views/crm/invoice/index.vue
scripts.build:dev: deno task verify:offline-icons && vite build --mode dev
scripts.build:test: deno task verify:offline-icons && vite build --mode test
scripts.build:stage: deno task verify:offline-icons && vite build --mode stage
scripts.build:prod: deno task verify:offline-icons && vite build --mode prod
scripts.verify:crm-statistics: deno test -A --no-check src/views/crm/statistics/performance/growthRate.test.mjs src/views/crm/statistics/performance/performanceTarget.test.mjs src/views/crm/statistics/customer/dealCycle.test.mjs src/views/crm/statistics/statisticsRegression.test.mjs src/views/crm/statistics/workorder/workOrderTrendOptions.test.mjs && eslint --max-warnings=0 --ext .ts,.vue src/api/crm/statistics src/views/crm/statistics src/locales/zh-CN/crm.ts src/locales/en/crm.ts src/locales/ar/crm.ts
